## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Account Director role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Director Model:** GrowthX is reorganizing to separate strategy from execution. Directors become a pooled resource, focusing on high-level strategy (SEO, AEO) and building playbooks, not owning accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [**Candidate Fit:** Maurice's background in B2B SaaS growth for technical audiences (devs, engineers) aligns with GrowthX's need to serve similar clients.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Attribution Strategy:** For organic-only content, Maurice connects content to pipeline by tracking traffic sources (Ahrefs, GA) and proving content's value as the foundation for an inbound engine.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**"Zero-to-One" Experience:** Maurice built an AI-powered content repurposing workflow (Claude, Opus Pro, Descript) that increased social engagement 30% and blog traffic 15%.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Reorg & Director Role

  - [**Problem:** Directors were getting "mired in the weeds" of production, preventing strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new model separates responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [**Managing Editors:** Production (2–3 clients, 5 pieces/week).](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers:** Relationship owners (8–12 clients).](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [**Directors:** Pooled strategic resource.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Director Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [High-level strategy (SEO, AEO).](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Intervening for at-risk accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [Building playbooks for new processes.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Work Management:** Directors will use a ticketing system (e.g., Linear) to manage requests from Engagement Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### Candidate Background & Philosophy

  - [**Experience:** B2B SaaS growth for technical audiences (devs, engineers) at PromptQL (formerly Hasura) and LaunchDarkly.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Focus:** Connecting product value to audiences and building scalable growth systems.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [**Core Belief:** Organic content is the foundation for an inbound engine; without it, sales teams must work 3–5x harder.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Organic Attribution & Pipeline

  - [**Challenge:** Demonstrating ROI for organic-only content.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
      - [**Proof Point:** Track traffic sources (Ahrefs, GA) to show content's impact on long-tail keywords and AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Client Framing:** Position content as the essential narrative that fuels inbound growth.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### "Zero-to-One" Process Example

  - [**Project:** Created a content repurposing workflow from webinars.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [**Tools:** Claude, Opus Pro, Descript.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**Input:** Long-form webinar video.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
      - [**Output:** 5+ pieces of content (short-form video, social snippets, blog posts).](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**AI Training:** Fed Claude speaker transcripts to retain their voice.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [**Results:** 30% social engagement increase, 15% blog traffic increase.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Content for Technical Audiences

  - [**Challenge:** Creating accurate content for clients at the forefront of their field.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**AI Training:** Build a "brain" for AI tools by feeding them all available content from client experts.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Trust Building:** Deliver consistent, high-quality content to earn client confidence and reduce micromanagement.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### Work Prioritization

  - [**Method:** Prioritize work based on client impact.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [**Hierarchy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
    1.  [High-spend accounts](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
    2.  [At-risk accounts](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
    3.  [Accounts with tight deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [**Adaptability:** Open to aligning with GrowthX's established prioritization methods.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tucker:** Schedule the next interview (screening) and the final panel interview.](https://fathom.video/share/mB3wxWUi_8XFFnZx-tZW3Q1GS_ba7ek8?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
